title: Árpád Rusz
text: Home * People * Árpád Rusz Árpád Rusz [1] Árpád Rusz , a Romanian chess player [2] and chess endgame study composer [3] . He contributed along with Guy Haworth on Position Criticality in Chess Endgames at the Advances in Computer Games 13 conference in Tilburg [4] , demonstrating the implementation of their algorithm to help analyze uniqueness in endgame positions objectively with a chess variant called Starchess [5] , invented by László Polgár in 2002, which has a star-shaped board of 37 hexagons [6] .
